lastReleaseMessage: library: grid-auto-rows:150px so tiles can't collapse short; tile fills cell at 100%/100%; container 480px tall for three rows; images stop overflowing into the next row

barRaise.topFinding: Sixth consecutive report, fifth day with zero remediation movement on the three standing HIGH findings, and the dirty tree got worse rather than better. HEAD is still v0.15.12 (453d206, 2026-06-01); no commit in five days. The three HIGHs are byte-for-byte unchanged: write-dashboard-status.ps1 still hardcodes barRaise all-null (99-106), audit.findings 0/0/0 (94), workQueueDepth 0 (107); the 47 em-dashes still ship across the six public files (27/8/6/4/1/1); and .work-queue.json still holds 18 pending yaa/apo items, oldest now 19 days, none drained. New today: an uncommitted cross-project script sweep prepended a self-locating-cwd preamble and a UTF-8 BOM to 15 scripts and left 15 untracked .bak files behind. The tree now carries the old drift-fixes, a fresh 30-path script churn, and six untracked report docs, all unstaged. The label engine remains healthy; the entire risk surface is the docs / dashboard / work-queue / script-sweep perimeter, where edits land but never commit.
